message:
feat(apr): add backfill command for metrics from existing rounds (fzi.9)

Adds `apr backfill` command to generate metrics from pre-existing round files:
- backfill_workflow: Process single workflow's rounds
- backfill_all_workflows: Process all configured workflows
- Uses file timestamps for round timestamps
- Calculates inter-round change metrics
- Updates convergence detection
- Supports --force and --dry-run flags

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2001,6 +2001,180 @@ update_convergence_metrics() {
     verbose "Convergence metrics updated"
 }
 
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Backfill Command (fzi.9)
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+backfill_workflow() {
+    local workflow="$1"
+    local force="${2:-false}"
+    local dry_run="${3:-false}"
+
+    local rounds_dir="$CONFIG_DIR/rounds/$workflow"
+    local workflow_file="$CONFIG_DIR/workflows/${workflow}.yaml"
+
+    verbose "Backfilling workflow: $workflow"
+    verbose "  rounds_dir: $rounds_dir"
+    verbose "  workflow_file: $workflow_file"
+    verbose "  force: $force, dry_run: $dry_run"
+
+    # Validate rounds directory exists
+    if [[ ! -d "$rounds_dir" ]]; then
+        print_error "No rounds found for workflow '$workflow'"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    # Validate workflow config exists
+    if [[ ! -f "$workflow_file" ]]; then
+        print_error "Workflow config not found: $workflow_file"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    # Check if metrics already exist
+    local metrics_path
+    metrics_path="$(metrics_dir "$workflow")/metrics.json"
+    if [[ -f "$metrics_path" ]] && [[ "$force" != "true" ]]; then
+        print_warning "Metrics already exist for '$workflow'"
+        print_info "Use --force to overwrite"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    if [[ "$dry_run" == "true" ]]; then
+        print_info "[DRY RUN] Would backfill workflow '$workflow'"
+    else
+        print_info "Backfilling metrics for workflow '$workflow'..."
+    fi
+
+    # Get sorted round files
+    local sorted_files=()
+    while IFS= read -r round_file; do
+        [[ -n "$round_file" ]] && sorted_files+=("$round_file")
+    done < <(find "$rounds_dir" -maxdepth 1 -name "round_*.md" -type f 2>/dev/null | sort -t_ -k2 -n)
+
+    if [[ ${#sorted_files[@]} -eq 0 ]]; then
+        print_warning "No round files found in $rounds_dir"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    verbose "Found ${#sorted_files[@]} round file(s)"
+
+    # Initialize metrics file (unless dry run)
+    if [[ "$dry_run" != "true" ]]; then
+        metrics_init "$workflow"
+    fi
+
+    local count=0
+    local prev_output=""
+
+    for round_file in "${sorted_files[@]}"; do
+        local round_num
+        round_num=$(basename "$round_file" .md | sed 's/round_//')
+
+        print_dim "  Analyzing round $round_num..."
+
+        if [[ "$dry_run" == "true" ]]; then
+            ((count++))
+            prev_output="$round_file"
+            continue
+        fi
+
+        # Collect output metrics
+        local output_metrics
+        output_metrics=$(collect_document_metrics "$round_file" "output")
+
+        # Get timestamp from file modification time (cross-platform)
+        local file_ts timestamp
+        file_ts=$(stat -c '%Y' "$round_file" 2>/dev/null || stat -f '%m' "$round_file" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
+        timestamp=$(date -d "@$file_ts" -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ" 2>/dev/null || \
+                   date -r "$file_ts" -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ" 2>/dev/null || \
+                   echo "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z")
+
+        verbose "Round $round_num: timestamp=$timestamp"
+
+        # Calculate changes from previous (if exists)
+        local change_metrics="null"
+        if [[ -n "$prev_output" && -f "$prev_output" ]]; then
+            change_metrics=$(calculate_change_metrics "$prev_output" "$round_file")
+            verbose "Round $round_num: change_metrics computed"
+        fi
+
+        # Build round record (note: documents is null since we can't backfill input state)
+        local round_record
+        round_record=$(jq -nc \
+            --argjson round "$round_num" \
+            --arg timestamp "$timestamp" \
+            --argjson output "$output_metrics" \
+            --argjson changes "$change_metrics" \
+            '{
+                round: $round,
+                timestamp: $timestamp,
+                documents: null,
+                output: $output,
+                changes_from_previous: $changes,
+                backfilled: true
+            }')
+
+        metrics_write_round "$workflow" "$round_num" "$round_record"
+        verbose "Round $round_num: saved to metrics"
+
+        prev_output="$round_file"
+        ((count++))
+    done
+
+    if [[ "$dry_run" == "true" ]]; then
+        print_info "[DRY RUN] Would backfill $count round(s)"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    # Calculate convergence
+    verbose "Calculating convergence metrics..."
+    update_convergence_metrics "$workflow"
+
+    print_success "Backfilled $count round(s)"
+    print_success "Calculated convergence metrics"
+}
+
+backfill_all_workflows() {
+    local force="${1:-false}"
+    local dry_run="${2:-false}"
+
+    local workflow_dir="$CONFIG_DIR/workflows"
+    if [[ ! -d "$workflow_dir" ]]; then
+        print_error "No workflows configured"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    verbose "Backfilling all workflows in: $workflow_dir"
+
+    local count=0
+    for config in "$workflow_dir"/*.yaml; do
+        [[ -f "$config" ]] || continue
+        local name
+        name=$(basename "$config" .yaml)
+
+        verbose "Processing workflow: $name"
+        backfill_workflow "$name" "$force" "$dry_run" || true
+        ((count++))
+    done
+
+    print_success "Processed $count workflow(s)"
+}
+
+cmd_backfill() {
+    local workflow="${1:-$WORKFLOW}"
+    local all="${BACKFILL_ALL:-false}"
+    local force="${BACKFILL_FORCE:-false}"
+    local dry_run="${DRY_RUN:-false}"
+
+    verbose "cmd_backfill: workflow=$workflow all=$all force=$force dry_run=$dry_run"
+
+    if [[ "$all" == "true" ]]; then
+        backfill_all_workflows "$force" "$dry_run"
+    else
+        backfill_workflow "$workflow" "$force" "$dry_run"
+    fi
+}
+
 # -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 # Interactive Setup Wizard
 # -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
@@ -3480,6 +3654,169 @@ show_stats() {
     elif [[ $total_rounds -eq 1 ]]; then
         print_dim "Tip: Run more rounds to see convergence trends"
     fi
+
+    if command -v jq &>/dev/null && ! metrics_exists "$workflow"; then
+        echo "" >&2
+        print_warning "No analytics data available for workflow '$workflow'"
+        print_info "Run 'apr backfill' to generate metrics from existing rounds"
+    fi
+}
+
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Backfill Metrics for Existing Rounds (fzi.9)
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+cmd_backfill() {
+    local workflow="${WORKFLOW:-default}"
+    local force="${BACKFILL_FORCE:-false}"
+    local dry_run="${DRY_RUN:-false}"
+    local all="${BACKFILL_ALL:-false}"
+
+    if [[ "$all" == "true" ]]; then
+        backfill_all_workflows "$force" "$dry_run"
+    else
+        backfill_workflow "$workflow" "$force" "$dry_run"
+    fi
+}
+
+backfill_workflow() {
+    local workflow="$1"
+    local force="$2"
+    local dry_run="$3"
+
+    local rounds_dir="$CONFIG_DIR/rounds/$workflow"
+    local workflow_file="$CONFIG_DIR/workflows/${workflow}.yaml"
+
+    if [[ ! -d "$rounds_dir" ]]; then
+        print_error "No rounds found for workflow '$workflow'"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    if [[ ! -f "$workflow_file" ]]; then
+        print_error "Workflow config not found: $workflow_file"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    if metrics_exists "$workflow" && [[ "$force" != "true" ]]; then
+        print_warning "Metrics already exist for '$workflow'"
+        print_info "Use --force to overwrite"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    if [[ "$dry_run" == "true" ]]; then
+        print_info "[DRY RUN] Would backfill workflow '$workflow'"
+    else
+        if metrics_exists "$workflow" && [[ "$force" == "true" ]]; then
+            metrics_write_atomic "$workflow" "$(metrics_default_json "$workflow")"
+        else
+            metrics_init "$workflow"
+        fi
+    fi
+
+    print_info "Backfilling metrics for workflow '$workflow'..."
+
+    local round_files=()
+    local round_file
+    for round_file in "$rounds_dir"/round_*.md; do
+        [[ -f "$round_file" ]] || continue
+        round_files+=("$round_file")
+    done
+
+    if [[ ${#round_files[@]} -eq 0 ]]; then
+        print_warning "No round files found for workflow '$workflow'"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    local sorted_files=()
+    mapfile -t sorted_files < <(printf '%s\n' "${round_files[@]}" | sort -t_ -k2 -n)
+
+    local count=0
+    local prev_output=""
+
+    for round_file in "${sorted_files[@]}"; do
+        local round_num
+        round_num=$(basename "$round_file" .md | sed 's/round_//')
+        [[ "$round_num" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] || continue
+
+        print_dim "  Analyzing round $round_num..."
+
+        if [[ "$dry_run" == "true" ]]; then
+            ((count++))
+            prev_output="$round_file"
+            continue
+        fi
+
+        local output_metrics
+        output_metrics=$(collect_document_metrics "$round_file" "output")
+        if [[ -z "$output_metrics" ]]; then
+            output_metrics="null"
+        fi
+
+        local file_ts timestamp
+        file_ts=$(stat -c '%Y' "$round_file" 2>/dev/null || stat -f '%m' "$round_file" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
+        timestamp=$(date -d "@$file_ts" -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ" 2>/dev/null || \
+            date -r "$file_ts" -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ" 2>/dev/null || \
+            echo "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z")
+
+        local change_metrics="null"
+        if [[ -n "$prev_output" && -f "$prev_output" ]]; then
+            change_metrics=$(calculate_change_metrics "$prev_output" "$round_file") || change_metrics="null"
+        fi
+
+        local round_record
+        round_record=$(jq -nc \
+            --argjson round "$round_num" \
+            --arg timestamp "$timestamp" \
+            --argjson output "$output_metrics" \
+            --argjson changes "$change_metrics" \
+            '{
+                round: $round,
+                timestamp: $timestamp,
+                documents: null,
+                output: $output,
+                changes_from_previous: $changes,
+                backfilled: true
+            }')
+
+        metrics_write_round "$workflow" "$round_num" "$round_record"
+
+        prev_output="$round_file"
+        ((count++))
+    done
+
+    if [[ "$dry_run" == "true" ]]; then
+        print_info "[DRY RUN] Would backfill $count rounds"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    verbose "Calculating convergence metrics..."
+    update_convergence_metrics "$workflow"
+
+    print_success "Backfilled $count rounds"
+    print_success "Calculated convergence metrics"
+}
+
+backfill_all_workflows() {
+    local force="$1"
+    local dry_run="$2"
+
+    local workflow_dir="$CONFIG_DIR/workflows"
+    if [[ ! -d "$workflow_dir" ]]; then
+        print_error "No workflows configured"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    local count=0
+    local config
+    for config in "$workflow_dir"/*.yaml; do
+        [[ -f "$config" ]] || continue
+        local name
+        name=$(basename "$config" .yaml)
+        backfill_workflow "$name" "$force" "$dry_run" || true
+        ((count++))
+    done
+
+    print_success "Processed $count workflow(s)"
 }
 
 # =============================================================================
